atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain following a basketball injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he fell to the ground after being bumped by another player

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he landed on his side

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he was unable to continue playing

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports ice and an ace wrap were applied immediately following the injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain has persisted for seven days

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes metformin 500mg twice daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient checks his blood sugars every morning

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any prior knee injuries or surgeries

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals right knee swelling and effusion

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Palpation of the medial aspect of the right knee elicits tenderness

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Range of motion is decreased, particularly with flexion

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Right knee medial collateral ligament strain
